headline: Dover (DOV) Stock After CoLOS V7 Launch And Q1 Beat Is The 12.8% Undervaluation Case Convincing
summary: Dover (DOV) is back in focus after Markem-Imaje launched its CoLOS Software Version 7 with added automation and cybersecurity features, along with a Q1 report where revenue exceeded estimates and the stock gained 22% over the past year. See our latest analysis for Dover. After a strong Q1 and the CoLOS Version 7 launch, Dover’s share price has gained 11.1% year to date, with a 1-year total shareholder return of 24.5% and 5-year total shareholder return of 61.8%. This points to steady momentum...
